{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Worldweavers
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Worldweavers]] are a powerful force within the [[Tanakite Empire]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|There were at least a dozen powerful [[Worldweavers]] among the [[Tanakites]]' prisoners.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
